description: Double free when flag is true: free called twice on same pointer. Safe version nulls pointer after free.

expected.notes: Conditional double free — if flag is true, buf freed at line 6 and again at line 8. Aspirational state analysis finding.
FP: malloc at line 4 is unconditionally freed at line 8, so there is no leak path.
FP: conditional_free_safe properly nullifies pointer after free and checks before second free — no leak.
